channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped mattresses, chairs and misc rubbish - unseen from road as it is below an embankment., 28th March
item.description:
W3w location - bordering.unlisted.fishnet
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckholt Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long uneven pothole been repaired before - breaking down needs fixing before it gets worse as drivers are not able to avoid, 28th March
item.description:
On the left hand side of railway bridge on Swindon Road heading towards Windyridge Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge blocking view, 28th March
item.description:
Next to Kilkenny pub ///smallest.enhanced.hypnotist I’ve reported this previously. The photo is my view. It’s not safe. Workers were on that road a week ago. Job could have been done then to cut this back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 28th March
item.description:
Cheltenham Road, Longlevens opposite Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to waste bin: 0273 Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Two bags, one containing general litter and the other cans/plastic bottles for recycling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Unsafe, uneven cracked pavement, 28th March
item.description:
Broken slabs, tree root disruption, cracks causing unsafe, uneven pavement. This is an access for my elderly mother to get to shops on Prestbury Road using her rollator walker or stick. The closer route via Overbrook Road is almost unusable for an elderly or disabled person. The state of the pavement is presenting a high risk to cause anyone to fall, particularly the elderly or disabled.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Cleevemount Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very uneven broken pavement, 28th March
item.description:
Broken slabs, tree root disruption, cracks and unsafe, uneven in the extreme. This is the closest access for my elderly mother to get to shops on Prestbury Road using her rollator walker or stick. The state of the pavement is presenting a high risk to cause anyone to fall, particularly the elderly or disabled.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Overbrook Drive, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
